---
title: "Dashboards"
subtitle: "Interactive data views on Swiss higher education"
description: "Explore dashboards on DORA and CoARA adoption, bibliometric findability, and institutional open data identifiers."
toc: false
show-page-image: false
listing:
  id: dashboards
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date-modified desc"
  filter-ui:
    - search
  max-items: 1000
  page-size: 1000
  fields:
    - image
    - title
    - date-modified
    - author
    - description
---

::: {#dashboards}
:::

::: {.callout-note}
Dashboard data are updated as source data and project outputs evolve.
Changes to the institutional data behind the NAIF and Swiss HEI dashboards are
documented in the [data changelog](data-changelog.qmd).
:::
